execute_as.description: What permissions should the procedure execution be called with

is_secure.description: Specifies whether the function/procedure is secure or not

arguments.description: List of arguments for the function/procedure

comment.description: Specifies a comment for the function/procedure

created_on.description: The date and time when the function/procedure was created

schema_name.description: The name of the schema in which the function/procedure exists.

database_name.description: The name of the database in which the function/procedure exists.

owner_role_type.description: The type of role that owns the function/procedure

is_builtin.description: If the function/procedure is built-in or not (user-defined)
